title: Tin  Ore
description: Simple mod that adds tin in the overworld
body:
Needs tin for your modpack but don't want to add a large mod? If so, this mod is made for you, it only adds tin ore and things related to it.

This mod add:
- Tin ore: naturally generates ore in the overworld
- Deepslate tin ore: harder than tin ore, naturally generates ore in the overworld
- Heavy tin block: block that craft from 4 tin, the same as the tin block but more harder.
- and commons block and items
- <font color="red">Items are not in creative tabs in 1.19</font>
